title: Live near a toll plaza? NHAI RajmargYatra app now offers Digital Local Pass and MargMitra Help Centre
summary: NHAI has introduced Digital Local Pass and the MargMitra Help Centre on the RajmargYatra app. Commuters can now buy Local Passes online without visiting toll plazas, while MargMitra offers FASTag support, complaint tracking and other highway services in 22 Indian languages.

title: Reported VRS payment as salary in ITR? Pune ITAT grants tax relief in ₹65.21 lakh case
summary: Pune ITAT has ruled that a ₹65.21 lakh payment received under a voluntary retirement scheme was a non-taxable capital receipt and not taxable salary or income from other sources. The tribunal also held that an incorrect claim in the ITR cannot override the true legal nature of the receipt.

title: Received an income tax notice? Verify authenticity before responding to protect against scams
summary: Taxpayers should always verify an Income Tax notice before responding. Using the PAN or Document Identification Number (DIN) on the official e-filing portal helps identify genuine notices, avoid scams, protect personal information and ensure timely compliance.

title: ₹16,649 crore unclaimed in LIC and inactive EPF accounts: What Centre's latest update means for you
summary: Over ₹16,649 crore lying in old LIC policies or inactive EPF accounts, says the Centre. Recovering dues requires checking past insurance, provident fund records, updating KYC and contact details, and responding to official reminders.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Gazette mandate on NPS and UPS differs sharply from employees' demand for OPS restoration
summary: The 8th Pay Commission is reviewing NPS and UPS benefits under its mandate, while employee unions continue to demand the restoration of the Old Pension Scheme. Here is how the Gazette notification differs from employees' key pension demands.

title: Did F&O or intraday trading last year? Your ITR filing due date isn't July 31
summary: In India, intraday and F&amp;O trading profits are taxed differently. Intraday trading is speculative business income, while F&amp;O is non-speculative. Taxpayers must file ITR-3 or ITR-4 depending on specific conditions. Here are the deadlines.

title: Claiming a deceased family member's mutual funds made less cumbersome: What SEBI has changed
summary: SEBI has asked AMFI to simplify the industry's transmission norms, making it less cumbersome for nominees and legal heirs to claim rights on mutual funds after the investor's death. Here's what changed under the revised framework.
